name: Conejo Guisado Con Coconut (Rabbit Stew with Coconut Crea
recipeIngredient: Rabbit meat, cut into serving pieces
Birdseye chillies, 3 finely sliced (remove seeds if too spicy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown rabbit pieces in a frying pan with a little oil.
2. Transfer browned rabbit to a large saucepan.
3. In the remaining oil, sauté finely chopped onion, capsicum, and chillies.
4. Add sliced tomato, salt, and pepper to taste, along with stock.
5. Bring mixture to a simmer, cover, and cook gently for about 2 hours or longer.
6. Lift rabbit pieces out of the saucepan and turn off heat under it.
7. Reduce liquid in the saucepan by half.
8. Lower heat and stir in coconut cream.
9. Return rabbit pieces to the saucepan and gently cook for a few minutes.
10. Serve with rice (serves 4).
